TEXT: REF 557 GUI :selected: PROPOSE TO HIRE BILIGUAL SECRETARY FOR FINANCIAL ADVISER IN CONAKRY AS PROVIDED IN SUPERVISION BUDGET TOP DONNA JENLOZ IS WIFE OF PEACE CORPS MEMBER AND AMERICAN CITIZEN. SALARY THREE HUNDRED DOLLARS PLUS GUINEAN FRANC EQUIVALENT ONE HUNDRED DOLLARS PER MONTH. HIRED LOCALLY THUS NO ANNUAL TRAVEL OR REPATRIATION EXPENSES INTENDED. PLEASE CONFIRM
